message:
fix(parser): deduplicate clusters, subgraphs, and labels in IR builder

When a cluster or subgraph is re-opened with the same key, return the
existing index instead of creating a duplicate entry. If the re-opened
definition provides a title that the existing one lacks, backfill it.

Also intern labels by text so identical labels share a single IrLabelId,
reducing IR bloat for diagrams that repeat the same label strings across
multiple nodes or edges.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
